detail.instructions: Implement CreateOrderUseCaseError::is_retryable. Return true only for RepositoryError::Unavailable and classify by variants, not by Display text.

hints.body: Retry policy belongs at the application boundary.
Use matches! for the one retryable shape.
Conflicts and domain errors should not be retried automatically.

detail.completionExplanation: Retry behavior is now explicit, typed, and independent from user-facing error wording.
